svg.title: MiniPlatform capstone architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing four layers: cloud infra provisioned by Terraform, a VM configured by Ansible running Docker Compose with an API and Redis, and a monitoring stack with Prometheus and Grafana observing the whole system. Arrows show the flow from Terraform provisioning the VM, Ansible configuring it, Docker running the app, and Prometheus scraping metrics.

g.text: All services run in Docker Compose on same VM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I write the Terraform config for the VPC and EC2 instance for MiniPlatform?')
sendPrompt('What should the Ansible playbook do to configure the MiniPlatform VM?')
sendPrompt('How do I write the runbook for the /chaos endpoint incident response in MiniPlatform?')
